arts.ttl: Osimhen set for SENSATIONAL January move as club re-enters talks
arts.sum: Victor Osimhen was one of the stories of the summer transfer window as the Napoli striker completed a surprise loan move to Galatasaray after a string of deals fell through. PSG had a deal for Osimhen breakdown, meanwhile, as they could not reach a deal on a transfer fee with Napoli, despite having brokered personal terms with the player, while Arsenal were unmoved after being quoted €130 million to sign the 25-year-old.
